title: 3-Bet Pot OOP Cbet
description: Range advantage confusion in 3-bet pots OOP
coreRule: 3BP OOP: на low/dry boards ты range advantage = small cbet 33%. На wet/high board = check range.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP SB vs BTN. Flop A-4-2 rainbow. Hero KK. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ A-high flop BTN has range advantage (more Ax). Check-call KK.
explanation.bet: Valid small bet — thin value + protect from overcards.
explanation.default: KK on A-high 3BP OOP — check is GTO default.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP SB. Flop 6-3-2 rainbow. Hero AA. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Low dry 3BP OOP = range cbet 33%. AA = top of range.
explanation.check: Slowplay rare — misses value from broadway.
explanation.default: Rule #29: low dry 3BP OOP = 33% range bet.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP BB vs CO. Flop J-T-9 (wet, straight possible). Hero AK. Action?

explanation.check: ✓ Wet connected board = check entire range OOP. CO has more straights/draws.
explanation.default: 3BP OOP на J-T-9 = check. Nuts и air оба check.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP SB. Flop 8-5-2 two-tone (spades). Hero QQ. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ QQ strong overpair. Small cbet deny flush draw equity.
explanation.default: Overpair на 2-tone dry = small cbet для защиты от draws.

decisions.description: 3BP BB. Flop 7-4-2 hero cbet 33%, CO called. Turn Kd. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Double barrel AA on K turn — card favors range. Size 50%.
explanation.check: Mixed OK — pot control, induce bluff.
explanation.default: AA на K turn в 3BP — barrel ~55%, check ~45%.

decisions.description: 3BP OOP SB. Flop 7-7-3. Hero AK no pair. Action?

explanation.bet: ✓ Paired low board 3BP OOP = range cbet 33%. Villain has no 7x in flatting range.
explanation.default: Paired low в 3BP OOP — small cbet frequent.
